text:
Case Law Cited
Pune Municipal Corporation v. Sus Road Baner Vikas Manch and 
others [2024] 9 SCR 374 : (2024) 9 SCC 1; Energy Watchdog 
v. Central Electricity Regulatory Commission and others [2017] 3 
SCR 153 : (2017) 14 SCC 80; Punjab State Power Corporation 
Limited and another v. Emta Coal Limited [2021] 11 SCR 772 : 
(2022) 2 SCC 1; Jaipur Vidyut Vitran Nigam Limited and others v. 
MB Power (Madhya Pradesh) Limited and others [2024] 1 SCR 
909 : (2024) 8 SCC 513; Sanjay Ramdas Patil v. Sanjay and 
others [2021] 11 SCR 640 : (2021) 10 SCC 306 – referred to.
